descriptions.it: Descrizione Sii un sognatore, fai la differenza! Unisciti a #VFInternshipProgram nella nostra sede centrale in EMEA a Stabio, Svizzera, come Retail Auditor, Intern per il Team Finanza. About VF VF sta ridefinendo cosa significa essere la migliore azienda di abbigliamento, calzature e attrezzature al mondo, alimentando marchi iconici di stile di vita attivo tra cui The North Face®, Vans® e Timberland®. Scopri di più su http://vfc.com. ## Informazioni chiave - Data di inizio: 1 giugno 2026 - Durata: 12 mesi, a tempo pieno - Stipendio mensile lordo: 1’850 CHF - Sede: Sede centrale VF EMEA a Stabio, Svizzera - Processo di selezione snello: 3 colloqui (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potenziale Caso di Business) ## Requisiti di ammissibilità - Devi essere laureando dopo il 1 maggio 2026 O avere uno status di studente a partire da giugno 2026 - Devi possedere cittadinanza UE o EEA (Spazio Economico Europeo) ## Mansioni Parliamo del ruolo! Sei interessato a supportare un team di Retail Audit e affrontare una sfida entusiasmante in un ambiente di negozio dinamico? In questo ruolo, tu: - Supporterai la preparazione di database per il lancio di nuove procedure di reclamo. - Contribuirai all’alfabetizzazione AI supportando l’integrazione di concetti di intelligenza artificiale nei processi esistenti per migliorare l’efficienza ove possibile. - Auditerai i movimenti di inventario, garantendo precisione tra i record del negozio e i dati contabili. - Assisterai i membri del team nelle loro attività operative e di audit quotidiane. ## Competenze richieste Come farai la differenza? Competenze che ti porteranno al successo: - Fluency in English, parlato e scritto; qualsiasi altra lingua europea come francese o tedesco è un plus - Solida conoscenza dei sistemi informatici, in particolare Microsoft Office e Outlook, con competenze avanzate in Excel. L’esperienza con strumenti di AI è un vantaggio. - Eccellenti capacità di pianificazione, analisi e organizzazione - Capacità di lavorare in modo indipendente e di collaborare efficacemente all’interno di un team ## Cosa imparerai Cosa otterrai? Alla fine del periodo di tirocinio, potrai aspettarti di avere una chiara comprensione di quanto segue: - Monitoraggio di Learning & Stock: Supporto alle attività quotidiane di inventario imparando a monitorare i livelli di stock e segnalando eventuali discrepanze. - Supporto alla raccolta e analisi dei dati: Aiutare il team a raccogliere dati per investigare le discrepanze di inventario e mappare le cause potenziali (ad esempio errori di inserimento o danni). - Supporto operativo per i conteggi: Partecipare attivamente a inventari periodici e conteggi ciclici, assicurando che i conteggi fisici corrispondano ai record di sistema sotto supervisione. - Collaborazione interfunzionale: Supportare il flusso di informazioni tra Supply Chain, Logistica e team di Magazzino per mantenere l’accuratezza dei dati. - Reporting di base e Dashboard: Aiutare a preparare semplici report di inventario e aggiornare dashboard di tracciamento (ad esempio usando Excel o strumenti interni). - Contributo ai processi: Fornire osservazioni “nuove” per identificare piccoli colli di bottiglia operativi e suggerire miglioramenti semplici ai flussi di lavoro quotidiani. ## Programma di stage Il Programma di Tirocinio VF EMEA è un percorso di 12 mesi progettato per sviluppare e potenziare i talenti emergenti all’inizio delle loro carriere. Siamo impegnati a sbloccare il tuo potenziale, quindi puoi aspettarti un percorso di apprendimento strutturato e un’esperienza pratica ricca di opportunità, tra cui: - Workshop dedicati allo sviluppo di competenze e progetto di gruppo di consulenza interna - Una giornata di lavoro in negozio per acquisire reali insight sui nostri marchi - Opportunità di networking con coetanei e leadership senior In questo tirocinio, acquisirai esperienza pratica su come vengono costruite e portate sul mercato le collezioni stagionali nel mercato europeo. Lavorerai a stretto contatto con merchandiser esperti, acquisendo esposizione a strategia di prodotto, insight sui consumatori e collaborazione interfunzionale. Non possiamo garantire che il tirocinio ti porterà a un contratto successivamente, ma grazie al valore dell’esperienza, la maggior parte dei nostri tirocinanti rimane in azienda anche dopo il periodo di tirocinio. ## Benefici Poiché vogliamo che tu ti concentri su ciò che conta, offriamo benefici completi che promuovono il benessere mentale, fisico e finanziario. Potrai usufruire di: - Politica di lavoro ibrido - Sconto del 50% sui marchi VF - Palestra in sede, con iniziative per la salute e il benessere - Mensa sussidiata e aree relax con bevande gratuite - Autobus navetta per l’ufficio o sconto sui trasporti pubblici, a seconda della tua posizione - Una comunità di tirocinanti vivace, con persone di background, stili di vita e nazionalità diverse che amano lavorare insieme. ## Inclusione e appartenenza Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging Come datore di lavoro che promuove le pari opportunità, ci impegniamo a favorire una cultura di appartenenza basata su rispetto, connessione, apertura e autenticità. Siamo dedicati a costruire e mantenere un ambiente di lavoro che celebri la diversità dei nostri collaboratori, permettendo loro di portare il proprio sé autentico ogni giorno. ## Contatto Sei interessato?
descriptions.en: Descrizione Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Retail Auditor, Intern for Finance Team. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . ## Informazioni chiave - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) ## Requisiti di ammissibilità - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship ## Mansioni Let’s talk about the role! Are you interested in supporting a Retail Audit team and taking on an exciting challenge within the dynamic store environment? In this role, you will: - Support database preparation for the launch of new claim procedures. - Contribute to AI literacy by supporting the integration of AI concepts into existing processes and procedures to improve efficiency where possible. - Audit inventory movements , ensuring accuracy between store records and accounting data. - Assist team members with their daily operational and audit activities. ## Competenze richieste How you will make a difference Skills that will make you succeed: - Fluency in English , spoken as well as written; any other European language like French or German is a plus - Strong working knowledge of computer systems, especially Microsoft Office and Outlook , with a dvanced Excel skills being essential. Exposure to AI tools is a plus. - Excellent planning, analytical, and organizational skills - Ability to work independently while also collaborating effectively within a team ## Cosa imparerai What’s in it for you At the end of the Internship period, you can expect to have a clear understanding of the below: - Learning & Stock Monitoring : Support daily inventory activities by learning how to monitor stock levels and reporting any immediate discrepancies. - Data Collection & Analysis Support : Assist the team in gathering data to investigate inventory mismatches and help map out potential root causes (e.g., entry errors or damages). - Operational Support for Counts : Actively participate in periodic stock takes and cycle counts, ensuring physical counts match system records under supervision. - Cross-functional Collaboration : Support information flow between Supply Chain, Logistics, and Warehouse teams to maintain data accuracy. - Basic Reporting & Dashboards : Help prepare simple inventory reports and update tracking dashboards (e.g., using Excel or internal tools). - Process Contribution : Provide "fresh-eye" observations to identify small operational bottlenecks and suggest simple improvements to daily workflows. ## Programma di stage The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership In this internship, you’ll gain hands-on experience in how seasonal assortments are built and brought to life across the European market. You’ll work closely with experienced merchandisers, gaining exposure to product strategy, consumer insights, and cross-functional collaboration. We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. ## Benefici Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. ## Inclusione e appartenenza Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. ## Contatto Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260327-0005
descriptions.de: Beschreibung Sei ein Träumer, mach den Unterschied! Werde Teil des #VFInternshipProgram in unserem EMEA-Hauptquartier in Stabio, Schweiz, als Retail Auditor, Praktikant für das Finanzteam. About VF VF definiert neu, was es bedeutet, das weltweit beste Unternehmen für Bekleidung, Schuhe und Ausrüstung zu sein, und unterstützt ikonische Marken für aktiven Lebensstil wie The North Face®, Vans® und Timberland®. Erfahre mehr unter http://vfc.com. ## Wichtige Informationen - Startdatum: 1. Juni 2026 - Dauer: 12 Monate, Vollzeit - Bruttomonatliches Gehalt: 1.850 CHF - Standort: VF EMEA Hauptsitz in Stabio, Schweiz - Optimierter Einstellungsprozess: 3 Interviews (Personalvermittler, Einstellungsleiter, potenzieller Business Case) ## Zulassungsvoraussetzungen - Du musst nach dem 1. Mai 2026 abschließen ODER ab Juni 2026 den Studentenstatus haben - Du musst die Staatsbürgerschaft der EU oder des EWR (Europäischer Wirtschaftsraum) besitzen ## Aufgaben Lass uns über die Rolle sprechen! Bist du daran interessiert, ein Retail Audit Team zu unterstützen und eine spannende Herausforderung in einem dynamischen Store-Umfeld anzunehmen? In dieser Rolle wirst du: - Unterstützung bei der Datenbankvorbereitung für den Start neuer Reklamationsverfahren. - Beitrag zur AI-Kompetenz, indem du die Integration von KI-Konzepten in bestehende Prozesse unterstützt, um die Effizienz zu verbessern. - Inventarbewegungen prüfen, um die Genauigkeit zwischen Ladenaufzeichnungen und Buchhaltungsdaten sicherzustellen. - Teammitglieder bei ihren täglichen operativen und Audit-Aktivitäten unterstützen. ## Anforderungen So kannst du einen Unterschied machen! Fähigkeiten, die dich erfolgreich machen: - Fließendes Englisch in Wort und Schrift; jede weitere europäische Sprache wie Französisch oder Deutsch ist ein Plus - Gute Kenntnisse in Computersystemen, insbesondere Microsoft Office und Outlook, mit fortgeschrittenen Excel-Kenntnissen. Erfahrung mit KI-Tools ist vorteilhaft. - Hervorragende Planungs-, Analyse- und Organisationsfähigkeiten - Fähigkeit, selbstständig zu arbeiten und effektiv im Team zu kollaborieren ## Was du lernen wirst Was dich erwartet? Am Ende des Praktikums kannst du folgendes erwarten: - Lern- & Lagerüberwachung: Unterstützung bei täglichen Inventaraktivitäten durch Monitoring der Lagerbestände und Meldung von Diskrepanzen. - Datenaufnahme & Analyse: Unterstützung bei der Datenerhebung zur Untersuchung von Inventardifferenzen und bei der Ursachenanalyse (z.B. Eingabefehler oder Schäden). - Operative Unterstützung bei Inventuren: Aktive Teilnahme an periodischen Bestandsaufnahmen und Zählungen, um sicherzustellen, dass physische Zählungen mit Systemaufzeichnungen übereinstimmen. - Interdisziplinäre Zusammenarbeit: Unterstützung beim Informationsaustausch zwischen Supply Chain, Logistik und Lagerteams zur Datenintegrität. - Grundlegende Berichte & Dashboards: Unterstützung bei der Erstellung einfacher Inventarberichte und Aktualisierung von Tracking-Dashboards (z.B. mit Excel oder internen Tools). - Prozessbeiträge: Frische Perspektiven zur Identifikation kleiner operativer Engpässe und Vorschläge für einfache Verbesserungen im Arbeitsalltag. ## Praktikumsprogramm Das VF EMEA Praktikumsprogramm ist eine 12-monatige Reise, die darauf ausgelegt ist, aufstrebende Talente zu entwickeln und zu fördern. Wir setzen uns dafür ein, dein Potenzial freizusetzen, sodass du eine strukturierte Lernreise und praktische Erfahrungen sammeln kannst, inklusive: - Spezielle Workshops zur Kompetenzentwicklung & internes Beratungsteam-Projekt - Einen Tag im Store, um echte Einblicke in unsere Marken zu gewinnen - Networking-Möglichkeiten mit Gleichgesinnten und Führungskräften In diesem Praktikum erhältst du praktische Einblicke, wie saisonale Kollektionen in den europäischen Markt eingebracht werden. Du arbeitest eng mit erfahrenen Merchandisern zusammen und erhältst Einblicke in Produktstrategie, Verbraucheranalysen und bereichsübergreifende Zusammenarbeit. Wir können nicht garantieren, dass das Praktikum zu einem Vertrag führt, aber dank der Erfahrung bleiben die meisten unserer Praktikanten nach dem Praktikum im Unternehmen. ## Vorteile Da wir möchten, dass du dich auf das Wesentliche konzentrierst, bieten wir umfassende Benefits, die das mentale, physische und finanzielle Wohlbefinden fördern. Du wirst genießen: - Hybrides Arbeitsmodell - 50% Rabatt auf VF-Marken - Fitnessraum vor Ort mit Gesundheits- und Wellness-Initiativen - Subventionierte Kantine sowie Pausenbereiche mit kostenlosen Getränken - Shuttle-Service zum Büro oder Rabatt auf öffentliche Verkehrsmittel, je nach Standort - Eine lebendige Praktikanten-Community mit Menschen verschiedener Hintergründe, Lebensstile und Nationalitäten, die gerne zusammenarbeiten. ## Inklusion und Zugehörigkeit Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging Als Arbeitgeber, der Chancengleichheit fördert, streben wir eine Kultur der Zugehörigkeit an, die auf Respekt, Verbindung, Offenheit und Authentizität basiert. Wir setzen uns dafür ein, einen Arbeitsplatz zu schaffen und zu erhalten, der die Vielfalt unserer Mitarbeitenden feiert, sodass sie jeden Tag authentisch sein können. ## Kontakt Bist du dabei? Bewirb dich jetzt – eine frühzeitige Bewerbung erhöht deine Chancen! #readytoapply R-20260327-0005
descriptions.fr: Description Soyez un rêveur, faites la différence ! Rejoignez #VFInternshipProgram dans notre siège EMEA à Stabio, Suisse, en tant que Stagiaire Auditeur Retail pour l'équipe Finance. About VF VF redéfinit ce que signifie être la meilleure entreprise mondiale de vêtements, chaussures et équipements, en soutenant des marques emblématiques de mode de vie actif telles que The North Face®, Vans® et Timberland®. En savoir plus sur http://vfc.com. ## Informations clés - Date de début : 1er juin 2026 - Durée : 12 mois, à temps plein - Salaire mensuel brut : 1’850 CHF - Lieu : Siège social VF EMEA à Stabio, Suisse - Processus de recrutement simplifié : 3 entretiens (Recruteur, Responsable du recrutement, étude de cas potentielle) ## Critères d’éligibilité - Vous devez être diplômé après le 1er mai 2026 OU avoir le statut d’étudiant à partir de juin 2026 - Vous devez détenir la citoyenneté de l’UE ou de l’EEE (Espace Économique Européen) ## Missions Parlons du rôle ! Êtes-vous intéressé à soutenir une équipe d’audit retail et relever un défi passionnant dans un environnement de magasin dynamique ? Dans ce rôle, vous allez : - Soutenir la préparation de bases de données pour le lancement de nouvelles procédures de réclamation. - Contribuer à la littératie en IA en soutenant l’intégration de concepts d’intelligence artificielle dans les processus existants pour améliorer l’efficacité lorsque cela est possible. - Auditer les mouvements d’inventaire, en assurant la précision entre les enregistrements du magasin et les données comptables. - Aider les membres de l’équipe dans leurs activités opérationnelles et d’audit quotidiennes. ## Compétences requises Comment faire la différence ? Compétences qui vous mèneront au succès : - Maîtrise courante de l’anglais, à l’oral comme à l’écrit ; toute autre langue européenne comme le français ou l’allemand est un plus - Bonne connaissance des systèmes informatiques, notamment Microsoft Office et Outlook, avec des compétences avancées en Excel. La familiarité avec des outils d’IA est un atout. - Excellentes compétences en planification, analyse et organisation - Capacité à travailler de manière autonome tout en collaborant efficacement au sein d’une équipe ## Ce que vous apprendrez Ce qui vous attend ? À la fin du stage, vous pourrez : - Surveiller les stocks et soutenir les activités quotidiennes d’inventaire en apprenant à suivre les niveaux de stock et à signaler toute divergence. - Soutenir la collecte et l’analyse de données pour enquêter sur les écarts d’inventaire et aider à identifier les causes potentielles (par exemple erreurs de saisie ou dommages). - Participer activement aux inventaires périodiques et comptages cycliques, en veillant à ce que les comptages physiques correspondent aux enregistrements du système sous supervision. - Favoriser la collaboration interfonctionnelle en soutenant la circulation de l’information entre la Supply Chain, la Logistique et les équipes d’entrepôt pour maintenir la précision des données. - Aider à la préparation de rapports simples et de tableaux de bord (par exemple avec Excel ou outils internes). - Apporter un regard neuf pour identifier de petits goulots d’étranglement opérationnels et proposer des améliorations simples aux flux de travail quotidiens. ## Programme de stage Le programme de stage VF EMEA est un parcours de 12 mois conçu pour développer et renforcer les talents émergents en début de carrière. Nous nous engageons à libérer votre potentiel, vous pouvez donc attendre un parcours d’apprentissage structuré et une expérience pratique enrichissante, comprenant : - Ateliers de développement des compétences et projet de groupe en conseil interne - Une journée en magasin pour acquérir de véritables insights sur nos marques - Opportunités de réseautage avec des pairs et la direction senior Dans ce stage, vous apprendrez comment les assortiments saisonniers sont construits et déployés sur le marché européen. Vous travaillerez en étroite collaboration avec des merchandisers expérimentés, en découvrant la stratégie produit, les insights consommateurs et la collaboration interfonctionnelle. Nous ne pouvons pas garantir que ce stage aboutira à un contrat, mais grâce à la valeur de l’expérience, la majorité de nos stagiaires restent dans l’entreprise après la période de stage. ## Avantages Parce que nous voulons que vous vous concentriez sur l’essentiel, nous offrons des avantages complets qui encouragent le bien-être mental, physique et financier. Vous bénéficierez de : - Politique de travail hybride - 50 % de réduction sur les marques VF - Salle de sport sur site, avec des initiatives pour la santé et le bien-être - Cantine subventionnée et espaces de détente avec boissons gratuites - Navette vers le bureau ou réduction sur les transports publics, selon votre localisation - Une communauté dynamique de stagiaires, avec des personnes de divers horizons, modes de vie et nationalités qui aiment travailler ensemble. ## Inclusion et appartenance Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging En tant qu’employeur garantissant l’égalité des chances, nous nous efforçons de favoriser une culture d’appartenance basée sur le respect, la connexion, l’ouverture et l’authenticité. Nous nous engageons à construire et maintenir un lieu de travail qui célèbre la diversité de nos collaborateurs, leur permettant d’être eux-mêmes chaque jour. ## Contact Vous êtes intéressé ? Postulez dès maintenant – une candidature précoce augmente vos chances ! #readytoapply R-20260327-0005

titles.it: Associato, Operazioni di Merchandising (Timberland)
titles.en: Associate, Merchandising Operations (Timberland)
titles.fr: Associé, Opérations de Marchandisage (Timberland)

descriptions.it: Descrizione Timberland EMEA cerca un eccezionale Associate, Merchandising Operations con contratto a tempo determinato di 6 mesi, per unirsi al nostro team con sede a Stabio, Svizzera. ## Mansioni Come Associate, Merchandising Operations, supportarai e possiederai parzialmente attività operative chiave attraverso Global Merchandising, Global Product, Regional Merchandising, Planning, Pricing e Commercial teams. Contribuirai a garantire l'accuratezza, la coerenza e la consegna tempestiva dei deliverable di Global Merchandising, mentre aiuterai a razionalizzare template, calendari, sistemi e processi per migliorare l'efficienza dell'organizzazione di merchandising. Contribuirai: - Coordinamento sistema Enovia/PLM - Mantenere e monitorare l'accuratezza dei dati all'interno di Enovia/PLM attraverso le categorie. - Agire come punto di contatto per problemi PLM di base-intermedi, garantendo l'escalation e la risoluzione tempestiva con il Merch Ops Manager e i team di sistema. - Supportare miglioramenti del sistema e adozione di nuovi strumenti/processi (test UAT, documentazione, aggiornamenti dei dati). - Identificare problemi ricorrenti o lacune e proporre miglioramenti ai flussi di dati o alle routine operative. ## Line Plan Communication and Management - Coordinare la distribuzione pre-stagione e in-stagione delle liste di linea, garantendo che gli aggiornamenti raggiungano tutti i partner cross-funzionali secondo il calendario. - Collaborare con Global Merchandising, Regional Merchandising, Planning, Pricing, Master Data e Commercial teams per garantire l'accuratezza delle informazioni sui prodotti e il flusso tempestivo dei sistemi in SAP. - Supportare la risoluzione dei problemi a livello di SKU e i ritardi di sindrome, guidando l'analisi di primo livello prima dell'escalation. ## Merchandising Operations & Process Support - Mantenere e aggiornare calendari, template e timeline di merchandising globale. - Aiutare a garantire l'aderenza ai processi attraverso i team di merchant monitorando le scadenze e tracciando i traguardi chiave. - Preparare e mantenere documentazione di processo, materiali di input, dashboard e report utilizzati dalla funzione Merch Ops. - Contribuire a identificare aree di miglioramento dei processi e supportare l'implementazione di nuovi modi di lavorare. - Rappresentare Merch Ops in riunioni cross-funzionali selezionate quando richiesto, garantendo una comunicazione chiara dei deliverable e dei follow-up. ## Merch Analytics & Reporting - Supportare team di categoria e merchandising con report ad-hoc, dati strutturati e informazioni preliminari. - Coordinare attività di sviluppo del catalogo, garantendo la raccolta e la convalida tempestiva delle informazioni sui prodotti. - Mantenere aggiornate le banche dati di merchandising e garantire l'accessibilità delle informazioni per gli stakeholder interni ed esterni. ## Requisiti L'Associate Merch Ops ideale ha forti capacità analitiche, attenzione al dettaglio e mentalità collaborativa, con crescente autonomia e fiducia nella gestione dei flussi di lavoro operativi. - Alcuni anni di esperienza in Merch Ops, Merchandising, Planning, Business Operations o ruoli simili - Forti competenze in Excel e buona comprensione dei sistemi PLM - Solida comprensione del processo GTM e meccaniche di base del retail/wholesale - Familiarità con concetti di pianificazione merchandising e creazione di prodotti è un forte vantaggio - Capacità di organizzare informazioni, gestire scadenze multiple e supportare la decisione - Forti competenze di comunicazione e gestione degli stakeholder - Fluente in inglese (scritto e verbale) - Laurea o Master in Business, Economia, Ingegneria, Apparel o campi correlati ## Cosa offriamo ## Free to Be, Inclusion & Diversity Come azienda guidata dallo scopo e dalle prestazioni, promuoviamo una cultura dell'appartenenza basata sul rispetto, l'apertura, la connessione e l'autenticità. Celebriamo la diversità e supportiamo pari opportunità per tutti gli associati e i candidati. ## Contatto Se questo sembra essere il lavoro giusto per te e sei pronto a unirti al nostro team, sarei felice di sentirti! #readytoapply R-20260309-0029
descriptions.en: Descrizione Timberland EMEA is looking for an exceptional Associate, Merchandising Operations on a 6‑month fixed‑term contract , to join our team based in Stabio, Switzerland. ## Mansioni As Associate, Merchandising Operations , you will support and partially own key operational activities across Global Merchandising, Global Product, Regional Merchandising, Planning, Pricing and Commercial teams. You will contribute to ensuring accuracy, consistency and timely delivery of Global Merchandising deliverables, while helping streamline templates, calendars, systems and processes to improve efficiency across the merchandising organization. You will contribute by: - Enovia/PLM System Coordination - Maintain and monitor data accuracy within Enovia/PLM across categories. - Act as a point of contact for basic-to-intermediate PLM issues, ensuring timely escalation and resolution with the Merch Ops Manager and system teams. - Support system enhancements and new tool/process adoption (UAT testing, documentation, data updates). - Identify recurring issues or gaps and propose improvements to data flows or operational routines. ## Line Plan Communication and Management - Coordinate pre‑season and in‑season distribution of line lists, ensuring updates reach all cross‑functional partners according to calendar. - Collaborate with Global Merchandising, Regional Merchandising, Planning, Pricing, Master Data and Commercial teams to ensure product information accuracy and timely system flow into SAP. - Support troubleshooting for SKU‑level issues and syndication delays, driving first-level analysis before escalation. ## Merchandising Operations & Process Support - Maintain and update global merchandising calendars, templates and timelines. - Help ensure process adherence across merchant teams by monitoring deadlines and tracking key milestones. - Prepare and maintain process documentation, input materials, dashboards and reports used by the Merch Ops function. - Contribute to identifying areas for process improvement and support implementation of new ways of working. - Represent Merch Ops in selected cross-functional meetings when required, ensuring clear communication of deliverables and follow-ups. ## Merch Analytics & Reporting - Support category and merchandising teams with ad‑hoc reports, structured data pulls and preliminary insights. - Coordinate catalogue development tasks, ensuring timely collection and validation of product information. - Maintain updated merchandising databases and ensure accessibility of information for internal and external stakeholders. ## Requisiti The ideal Associate, Merch Ops has strong analytical skills, attention to detail, and a collaborative mindset, with growing autonomy and confidence in managing operational workflows. - A few years of experience in Merch Ops, Merchandising, Planning, Business Operations or similar roles - Strong Excel skills and good understanding of PLM systems - Solid understanding of GTM process and basic retail/wholesale mechanics - Familiarity with merchandising planning concepts and product creation is a strong plus - Ability to organize information, manage multiple deadlines and support decision‑making - Strong communication and stakeholder management skills - Fluent in English (written and verbal) - Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Business, Economics, Engineering, Apparel or related fields ## Cosa offriamo ## Free to Be, Inclusion & Diversity As a purpose‑led, performance‑driven company, we foster a culture of belonging based on respect, openness, connection, and authenticity. We celebrate diversity and support equal opportunities for all associates and applicants. ## Contatto If this sounds like you and you’re ready to join our team, we’d love to hear from you! #readytoapply R-20260309-0029
descriptions.de: Beschreibung Timberland EMEA sucht einen außergewöhnlichen Associate, Merchandising Operations mit einem 6-monatigen Festvertrag, um unserem Team in Stabio, Schweiz, beizutreten. ## Aufgaben Als Associate, Merchandising Operations, unterstützen Sie wichtige operative Aktivitäten über Global Merchandising, Global Product, Regional Merchandising, Planning, Pricing und Commercial Teams. Sie tragen dazu bei, die Genauigkeit, Konsistenz und termingerechte Lieferung von Global Merchandising-Deliverables sicherzustellen, während Sie Vorlagen, Kalender, Systeme und Prozesse optimieren, um die Effizienz der Merchandising-Organisation zu verbessern. Sie tragen bei: - Koordination des Enovia/PLM-Systems - Sicherstellung und Überwachung der Datenakkuratesse innerhalb von Enovia/PLM über Kategorien. - Als Ansprechpartner für grundlegende bis mittlere PLM-Probleme fungieren, um eine zeitnahe Eskalation und Lösung mit dem Merch Ops Manager und den Systemteams sicherzustellen. - Systemverbesserungen und die Einführung neuer Tools/Prozesse unterstützen (UAT-Tests, Dokumentation, Datenaktualisierungen). - Wiederkehrende Probleme oder Lücken identifizieren und Verbesserungen der Datenflüsse oder operativen Routinen vorschlagen. ## Line Plan Kommunikation und Management - Koordination der Vor- und In-Season-Verteilung von Linienlisten, um sicherzustellen, dass Aktualisierungen alle funktionsübergreifenden Partner gemäß Kalender erreichen. - Zusammenarbeit mit Global Merchandising, Regional Merchandising, Planning, Pricing, Master Data und Commercial Teams, um die Genauigkeit von Produktinformationen und den zeitgerechten Systemfluss in SAP sicherzustellen. - Unterstützung bei der Fehlerbehebung auf SKU-Ebene und Syndikatsverzögerungen, um eine erste Analyse vor der Eskalation durchzuführen. ## Merchandising Operations & Process Support - Globale Merchandising-Kalender, Vorlagen und Zeitpläne pflegen und aktualisieren. - Sicherstellung der Prozesseinhaltung über Merchant-Teams durch Überwachung von Fristen und Verfolgung wichtiger Meilensteine. - Prozessdokumentation, Eingabematerialien, Dashboards und Berichte, die von der Merch Ops-Funktion verwendet werden, vorbereiten und pflegen. - Beitrag zur Identifizierung von Bereichen für Prozessverbesserungen und Unterstützung bei der Implementierung neuer Arbeitsweisen. - Merch Ops in ausgewählten funktionsübergreifenden Meetings vertreten, wenn erforderlich, um eine klare Kommunikation von Deliverables und Follow-ups sicherzustellen. ## Merch Analytics & Reporting - Kategorie- und Merchandising-Teams bei Ad-hoc-Berichten, strukturierten Datenabzügen und vorläufigen Erkenntnissen unterstützen. - Katalogentwicklungsaufgaben koordinieren, um eine zeitgerechte Sammlung und Validierung von Produktinformationen sicherzustellen. - Aktualisierte Merchandising-Datenbanken pflegen und sicherstellen, dass Informationen für interne und externe Interessengruppen zugänglich sind. ## Anforderungen Der ideale Associate Merch Ops verfügt über starke analytische Fähigkeiten, Aufmerksamkeit für Details und eine kooperative Denkweise, mit wachsender Autonomie und Selbstvertrauen bei der Verwaltung von operativen Workflows. - Einige Jahre Erfahrung in Merch Ops, Merchandising, Planning, Business Operations oder ähnlichen Rollen - Starke Excel-Fähigkeiten und gutes Verständnis von PLM-Systemen - Solides Verständnis des GTM-Prozesses und grundlegender Einzelhandels-/Großhandelsmechaniken - Vertrautheit mit Merchandising-Planungskonzepten und Produktkreation ist ein starker Pluspunkt - Fähigkeit, Informationen zu organisieren, mehrere Fristen zu verwalten und Entscheidungen zu unterstützen - Starke Kommunikations- und Stakeholder-Management-Fähigkeiten - Fließend in Englisch (schriftlich und mündlich) - Bachelor- oder Master-Abschluss in Betriebswirtschaft, Volkswirtschaft, Ingenieurwesen, Bekleidung oder verwandten Feldern ## Was wir bieten ## Frei sein, Inklusion & Vielfalt Als zweckorientiertes, leistungsgetriebenes Unternehmen fördern wir eine Kultur der Zugehörigkeit, die auf Respekt, Offenheit, Verbindung und Authentizität basiert. Wir feiern Vielfalt und unterstützen gleiche Chancen für alle Associates und Bewerber. ## Kontakt Wenn dies nach Ihnen klingt und Sie bereit sind, unserem Team beizutreten, freuen wir uns, von Ihnen zu hören! #readytoapply R-20260309-0029
descriptions.fr: Description Timberland EMEA recherche un Associate, Merchandising Operations exceptionnel en contrat à durée déterminée de 6 mois, pour rejoindre notre équipe basée à Stabio, Suisse. ## Missions En tant qu'Associate, Merchandising Operations, vous soutiendrez et prendrez partiellement en charge des activités opérationnelles clés à travers le Merchandising mondial, le Produit mondial, le Merchandising régional, la Planification, la Tarification et les équipes commerciales. Vous contribuerez à assurer l'exactitude, la cohérence et la livraison en temps voulu des livrables de Merchandising mondial, tout en aidant à rationaliser les modèles, les calendriers, les systèmes et les processus pour améliorer l'efficacité de l'organisation de merchandising. Vous contribuerez en: - Coordination du système Enovia/PLM - Maintenir et surveiller l'exactitude des données au sein d'Enovia/PLM à travers les catégories. - Agir en tant que point de contact pour les problèmes PLM de base à intermédiaires, en garantissant une escalade et une résolution en temps voulu avec le Merch Ops Manager et les équipes système. - Soutenir les améliorations du système et l'adoption de nouveaux outils/processus (tests UAT, documentation, mises à jour des données). - Identifier les problèmes récurrents ou les lacunes et proposer des améliorations des flux de données ou des routines opérationnelles. ## Communication et gestion du plan de ligne - Coordonner la distribution pré-saison et en saison des listes de ligne, en garantissant que les mises à jour atteignent tous les partenaires fonctionnels selon le calendrier. - Collaborer avec les équipes de Merchandising mondial, de Merchandising régional, de Planification, de Tarification, de Master Data et Commercial pour garantir l'exactitude des informations sur les produits et le flux système en temps voulu dans SAP. - Soutenir la dépannage des problèmes au niveau du SKU et des retards de syndication, en menant une analyse de premier niveau avant l'escalade. ## Support des opérations de merchandising et des processus - Maintenir et mettre à jour les calendriers, les modèles et les chronologies de merchandising mondial. - Aider à garantir l'adhérence aux processus à travers les équipes de merchant en surveillant les délais et en traçant les jalons clés. - Préparer et maintenir la documentation de processus, les matériaux d'entrée, les tableaux de bord et les rapports utilisés par la fonction Merch Ops. - Contribuer à identifier les domaines d'amélioration des processus et soutenir la mise en œuvre de nouvelles façons de travailler. - Représenter Merch Ops dans certaines réunions fonctionnelles lorsque cela est nécessaire, en garantissant une communication claire des livrables et des suivis. ## Analyse et reporting de merchandising - Soutenir les équipes de catégorie et de merchandising avec des rapports ad hoc, des extractions de données structurées et des informations préliminaires. - Coordonner les tâches de développement de catalogue, en garantissant la collecte et la validation en temps voulu des informations sur les produits. - Maintenir les bases de données de merchandising à jour et garantir l'accessibilité des informations pour les parties prenantes internes et externes. ## Exigences L'Associate Merch Ops idéal possède de solides compétences analytiques, une attention aux détails et une mentalité collaborative, avec une autonomie et une confiance croissantes dans la gestion des flux de travail opérationnels. - Quelques années d'expérience dans Merch Ops, Merchandising, Planning, Business Operations ou des rôles similaires - Solides compétences en Excel et bonne compréhension des systèmes PLM - Solide compréhension du processus GTM et des mécanismes de base du commerce de détail/grand commerce - Familiarité avec les concepts de planification de merchandising et de création de produits est un atout - Capacité à organiser les informations, à gérer plusieurs délais et à soutenir la prise de décision - Solides compétences en communication et en gestion des parties prenantes - Courant en anglais (écrit et oral) - Diplôme de licence ou de master en commerce, économie, ingénierie, habillement ou domaines connexes ## Ce que nous offrons ## Libre d'être, Inclusion & Diversité En tant qu'entreprise axée sur l'objectif et la performance, nous favorisons une culture de l'appartenance fondée sur le respect, l'ouverture, la connexion et l'authenticité. Nous célébrons la diversité et soutenons l'égalité des chances pour tous les associés et les candidats. ## Contact Si cela vous ressemble et que vous êtes prêt à rejoindre notre équipe, nous serions ravis de vous entendre! #readytoapply R-20260309-0029

titles.it: Sviluppatore, Apparel
titles.en: Developer, Apparel
titles.fr: Développeur, Apparel

descriptions.it: Timberland EMEA is looking for an exceptional Developer, Apparel , to join our team based in Stabio, Switzerland. ## Let’s Talk about the Role As a key member of our Product Development team, you will provide insights and suggestions and share information to deliver quality products on time at the right cost for the intended performance use. Your work will be performed under general guidance and direction, which may require the initiation of contacts to resolve and discuss mutual problems or collaboration on procedures or transactions. Infrequent overseas development travel may be necessary. ## How You Will Make a Difference - Develop product across multiple genders by product category depending on the seasonal style count and expertise. - Participate meetings and execute against the Product expectations for product quality, cost (predictive costing) - Own Product specifications, measurements, BOM, Fit creations and maintenance. - Communicate effectively and clearly with Asia sourcing & vendors, TD/ GPC / GSP - Collaborate w/ design & merch to support the line plan through product execution and signing of for bulk production. - Hit required product creation milestones and execute on strategy - Work w/ Global Product costing team in VFA and internal merch/ design teams on seasonal FOBs to support Gross margin growth. - Be an engaged and committed team-mate, Be a facilitator in negotiations. ## ## Skills for Success The foundation skills you will need in this position are: - The ability to work with cross-functional teams, including Consumer Research, Research and Development to compile and evaluate research on future product requirements and identify enhancements to current products - The aptitude to help the Product Development team establish strategies ranging from product pricing, design, marketing, advertising, packaging, and future products to manage the product family's life - An understanding and knowledge of Timberland’s principles, practices, and procedures - The resourcefulness to determine a course of action based on guidelines and modify processes and methods as required - The capability to resolve issues which are often varied and non-routine - Apply previous experience to identify the most appropriate option or improve existing approaches - Seek clarification when needed - Undertake analysis and investigation to solve differing, but related, problems - The talent to convey complex information to occasionally divergent audiences that may require some persuasion - In some instances, audiences are not knowledgeable of the subject matter - Or an objective review of difficult work problems, obtaining cooperation or approval ## While formal education in a related field is great to have, we are most interested in a few years of experience and professional achievements. ## What’s in it For You - A supportive, feedback‑based culture guided by respect and integrity. - An inclusive, international environment where diverse backgrounds and experiences are valued. - The opportunity to be part of an iconic lifestyle brand within a global, multi‑brand organization. - On‑site gym with health and well‑being initiatives. - A discount card offering 50% off all VF brands. - Break‑out areas with complimentary hot drinks. About Timberland At Timberland, we’re a force of nature. We’re a team that steps outside, works hard together, and moves the world forward. The brand is widely recognized as the arbiter of boot culture. With a rich heritage of craftsmanship and an eye toward the future, Timberland has a decades-long commitment to make products responsibly, protect the outdoors, and build community. ## Free to Be, Inclusion & Diversity As a purpose‑led, performance‑driven company, we foster a culture of belonging based on respect, openness, connection, and authenticity. We celebrate diversity and support equal opportunities for all associates and applicants. If this sounds like you and you’re ready to join our team, we’d love to hear from you! R-20260323-0023

titles.it: Analista, FP&A
titles.en: Analyst, FP&A
titles.fr: Analyste, FP&A

descriptions.it: Descrizione VF Corporation sta cercando un eccezionale analista FP&A , Shared Functions per unirsi al nostro team di finanza con sede a Stabio, Svizzera. Parliamo del ruolo! Come analista FP&A, supporterà le attività di FP&A del marchio relative alla pianificazione e previsione del P&L concentrandosi sulle vendite e sul margine del canale Wholesale, giocando un ruolo chiave nella creazione di allineamento intorno al Gross-To-Net, analizzando le dinamiche e le prestazioni dei principali canali e conti nonché supportando il marchio per prendere le giuste decisioni per massimizzare la marginalità. Raccoglierà informazioni sui dati di previsione e pianificazione, che devono essere caricati nel tool di reporting (BPC) e consegnare rapporti, come determinato dai responsabili dell'area e dal Senior Management. Per raggiungere gli obiettivi del reparto, lavorerà a stretto contatto con i colleghi del reparto Finanza nonché con altre funzioni come DTC, Pianificazione, Vendite e riferirà direttamente al Direttore, FP&A. Ci aspettiamo che consegni risultati eccezionali mentre adempie ai seguenti aspetti del ruolo di analista FP&A: ## Mansioni - Gestire e gestire gli strumenti di pianificazione e previsione finanziaria GTN e garantire la coerenza e l'accuratezza delle cifre inserite nei sistemi; - Garantire che i dati effettivi siano allineati alle aspettative e analizzare e segnalare proattivamente le variazioni rispetto alla previsione con - Mantenere un allineamento continuo tra finanziario e commerciale GTN per garantire l'allineamento / equilibrio tra vendite, margine e obiettivi di inventario; - Consegnare l'eccellenza dell'accuratezza delle previsioni e analizzare proattivamente le tendenze o dinamiche critiche all'interno dei canali e dei conti principali; - Garantire che tutte le richieste ricorrenti relative a previsioni e piani siano consegnate in modo accurato e in tempo: roll store, dettagli conti chiave, passeggiata entrate, ponte margine, panoramica categoria, ecc.; - Supportare il piano finanziario a 5 anni (LRP) che lavora con la strategia globale, la pianificazione globale della merce e le operazioni e il prodotto. Comprendere la strategia del marchio e supportare nel trarre conclusioni attraverso l'analisi finanziaria; - Assistere nell'analisi ad hoc su richiesta della gestione europea o globale / aziendale ## Requisiti - Laurea minima in area finanziaria (contabilità, controllo) e 1/2 anni di esperienza lavorativa correlata preferibile; - Solid skills software e PC (avanzato in Excel, PowerPoint, SAP / COGNOS, esperienza BPC è un plus) - Ottime capacità di gestione del tempo e di priorità con la capacità di rispettare scadenze rigorose - Forte comando inglese (scritto e verbale) - Competenze di comunicazione comprovate nell'interagire con persone di un background non finanziario - Eccellenti capacità organizzative e orientate agli obiettivi ## Cosa offriamo - Una cultura basata su feedback di supporto in cui il rispetto e l'integrità ci guidano in ciò che facciamo - Un ambiente internazionale inclusivo in cui le persone di diversi background, stili di vita e nazionalità amano lavorare insieme - Essere parte di un marchio di lifestyle iconico in un'organizzazione multi-marca e multi-paese - Palestra in loco che offre iniziative di salute e benessere - Una carta sconto con il 50% su tutti i marchi VF - Aree di ritrovo che offrono bevande calde gratuite ## Contatto R-20260323-0032
descriptions.en: VF Corporation is looking for an exceptional FP&A Analyst , Shared Functions to join our Finance team based in Stabio, Switzerland. Let’s talk about the role! As FP&A Analyst, will support brand FP&A activities related to P&L Planning and Forecasting focusing on Sales & Margin of Wholesale channel, playing a key role to create alignment around Gross-To-Net, analysing the main channel and accounts dynamics and performances as well as supporting the brand to make the right decisions to maximize marginality. You will gather information on forecast & plan data, which has to be loaded in the reporting tool (BPC) and deliver reports, as determined by area leads and Senior Management. To achieve the goals of the department you will work closely together with your colleagues of the Finance department as well as other functions such as DTC, Planning, Sales and report directly to the Director, FP&A. We expect that you will deliver unbeatable results whilst fulfilling the following aspects of the FP&A Analyst role: - Manage and handle Financial GTN planning and Forecasting tools and ensure consistency and accuracy of figures submitted in the systems; - Ensure that actuals are aligned to expectations and proactively analyse and report variances vs forecast with - Keep continuous alignment between financial & commercial GTN to ensure alignment/balance between Sales, Margin and inventory targets; - Deliver forecasting accuracy excellence and pro-actively analyze any critical trends or dynamics within the channels and the main accounts; - Ensure that all recurring requests related to forecast and plan are delivered accurately and on time: store roll, key accounts details, revenue walk, margin bridge, category overviews, etc.; - Support the 5YR rolling financial plan (LRP) partnering with the global strategy, global merch planning & Ops and Product. Understand the brand strategy and support in drawing conclusions through financial analysis; - Assist in ad-hoc analysis on request of European or Global/Corporate management Skills for Success You will be a professional with proven experience in business controlling and financial planning, with a strong analytical mindset and: - Minimum bachelor’s degree in finance area (accounting, controlling) and 1/2 years of related work experience preferrable; - Solid software and PC skills (Advanced in Excel, PowerPoint, SAP/COGNOS, BPC experience is a plus) - Great time management and prioritizing skills with the ability to meet strict deadlines - Strong English command (written and verbal) - Proven communication skills in interacting with people from a non-financial background - Excellent organizational skills & goal-oriented About VF VF is a global apparel company connecting people to the lifestyles they cherish through our family of iconic brands. At the heart of our journey lies our purpose: We power movements of sustainable and active lifestyles for the betterment of people and our planet. This is our purpose. It’s the reason we come to work every day. Our purpose unites us and leads us to pursue our goals, together. This is our calling. Learn more at vfc.com What’s in it For You We’re in the business of unleashing human potential, driven by the ideas, energy and commitment of our people. That’s why we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical and financial well-being for all VF associates. When it comes to benefits, we’re the total package. - A supportive feedback-based culture where respect and integrity guide us in what we do - An inclusive international environment where people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles and nationalities love working together - Be part of an iconic lifestyle brand in a multi brand, multi countries organization - On site gym offering health and well-being initiatives - A discount card with 50% on all VF brands - Break out areas offering complimentary hot drinks Free to Be, Inclusion & Diversity As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. R-20260323-0032
descriptions.de: Beschreibung VF Corporation sucht einen außergewöhnlichen FP&A-Analysten , Shared Functions, um unser Finanzielles Team mit Sitz in Stabio, Schweiz, zu unterstützen. Lass uns über die Rolle sprechen! Als FP&A-Analyst werden Sie die FP&A-Aktivitäten des Markenbereichs in Bezug auf P&L-Planung und -Prognose unterstützen, wobei der Schwerpunkt auf den Verkäufen und der Marge des Großhandelskanals liegt. Sie spielen eine Schlüsselrolle bei der Schaffung von Übereinstimmung um Gross-To-Net, analysieren die Dynamik und Leistung der wichtigsten Kanäle und Konten sowie unterstützen die Marke bei der richtigen Entscheidungsfindung, um die Marginalität zu maximieren. Sie werden Informationen über Prognose- und Planungsdaten sammeln, die in das Berichtstool (BPC) geladen werden müssen, und Berichte liefern, wie von den Bereichsleitern und dem Senior Management festgelegt. Um die Ziele der Abteilung zu erreichen, werden Sie eng mit Ihren Kollegen der Finanzabteilung sowie mit anderen Funktionen wie DTC, Planung, Vertrieb zusammenarbeiten und direkt an den Direktor, FP&A, berichten. Wir erwarten, dass Sie außergewöhnliche Ergebnisse liefern und dabei die folgenden Aspekte der FP&A-Analystenrolle erfüllen: ## Aufgaben - Verwaltung und Handhabung von Financial GTN-Planungs- und Prognose-Tools und Sicherstellung der Konsistenz und Genauigkeit der in den Systemen eingereichten Zahlen; - Sicherstellen, dass die Ist-Werte mit den Erwartungen übereinstimmen und proaktiv analysieren und berichten über Abweichungen gegenüber der Prognose mit - Kontinuierliche Übereinstimmung zwischen finanziell und kommerziell GTN, um die Übereinstimmung / Balance zwischen Umsatz, Marge und Lagerzielen sicherzustellen; - Lieferung von Prognose-Genauigkeitsexzellenz und proaktive Analyse von kritischen Trends oder Dynamiken innerhalb der Kanäle und Haupt Konten; - Sicherstellen, dass alle wiederkehrenden Anforderungen in Bezug auf Prognose und Planung genau und rechtzeitig geliefert werden: Store-Rollen, wichtige Kontodetails, Umsatzspaziergang, Marge-Brücke, Kategorieübersichten usw.; - Unterstützung des 5-jährigen rollierenden Finanzplans (LRP) in Partnerschaft mit der globalen Strategie, der globalen Merch-Planning & Ops und dem Produkt. Verstehen der Markenstrategie und Unterstützung bei der Ziehung von Schlussfolgerungen durch Finanzanalyse; - Unterstützung bei Ad-hoc-Analysen auf Anfrage der europäischen oder globalen / Unternehmensleitung ## Anforderungen - Mindestens Bachelor-Abschluss in Finanzbereich (Rechnungswesen, Controlling) und 1/2 Jahre relevante Berufserfahrung; - Solide Software- und PC-Kenntnisse (fortgeschritten in Excel, PowerPoint, SAP / COGNOS, BPC-Erfahrung ist ein Plus) - Gute Zeitmanagement- und Prioritätsfähigkeiten mit der Fähigkeit, strikte Fristen einzuhalten - Starke Englischkenntnisse (schriftlich und mündlich) - Nachweisbare Kommunikationsfähigkeiten bei der Interaktion mit Personen aus einem nichtfinanziellen Hintergrund - Hervorragende organisatorische Fähigkeiten und zielorientiert ## Was bieten wir - Eine unterstützende Feedback-basierte Kultur, in der Respekt und Integrität uns bei unserer Arbeit leiten - Eine inklusive internationale Umgebung, in der Menschen mit unterschiedlichem Hintergrund, Lebensstil und Nationalität gerne zusammenarbeiten - Teil eines ikonischen Lifestyle-Markenunternehmens in einer Multi-Marken-, Multi-Länder-Organisation - Vor-Ort-Fitnessstudio mit Gesundheits- und Wellness-Initiativen - Eine Rabattkarte mit 50% auf alle VF-Marken - Pausenbereiche mit kostenlosen heißen Getränken ## Kontakt R-20260323-0032
descriptions.fr: Description VF Corporation recherche un analyste FP&A exceptionnel , Shared Functions pour rejoindre notre équipe de finance basée à Stabio, Suisse. Parlons du rôle ! En tant qu'analyste FP&A, vous soutiendrez les activités FP&A de la marque liées à la planification et aux prévisions de P&L en mettant l'accent sur les ventes et la marge du canal de gros, jouant un rôle clé pour créer un alignement autour de Gross-To-Net, en analysant les dynamiques et les performances des principaux canaux et comptes ainsi qu'en aidant la marque à prendre les bonnes décisions pour maximiser la marginalité. Vous collecterez des informations sur les données de prévision et de planification qui doivent être chargées dans l'outil de reporting (BPC) et livrerez des rapports, comme déterminé par les responsables de la zone et la direction supérieure. Pour atteindre les objectifs du département, vous travaillerez en étroite collaboration avec vos collègues du département financier ainsi qu'avec d'autres fonctions telles que DTC, Planification, Ventes et rendrez compte directement au directeur, FP&A. Nous attendons de vous que vous livriez des résultats exceptionnels tout en remplissant les aspects suivants du rôle d'analyste FP&A : ## Tâches - Gérer et gérer les outils de planification et de prévision financière GTN et garantir la cohérence et l'exactitude des chiffres soumis dans les systèmes; - Assurer que les données réelles sont alignées sur les attentes et analyser et signaler de manière proactive les écarts par rapport à la prévision avec - Maintenir un alignement continu entre les aspects financiers et commerciaux GTN pour garantir l'alignement / l'équilibre entre les ventes, la marge et les objectifs de stock; - Livrer une excellence en matière de précision des prévisions et analyser de manière proactive les tendances ou dynamiques critiques au sein des canaux et des principaux comptes; - Assurer que toutes les demandes récurrentes liées aux prévisions et aux plans sont livrées avec précision et à temps: roulement des magasins, détails des comptes clés, promenade des revenus, pont de marge, vues d'ensemble de la catégorie, etc.; - Soutenir le plan financier à 5 ans (LRP) en partenariat avec la stratégie mondiale, la planification mondiale de la marchandise et les opérations et le produit. Comprendre la stratégie de la marque et soutenir la prise de conclusions grâce à l'analyse financière; - Assister à l'analyse ad hoc à la demande de la direction européenne ou mondiale / des entreprises ## Exigences - Diplôme minimum de licence en domaine financier (comptabilité, contrôle) et 1/2 an d'expérience professionnelle connexe; - Compétences solides en logiciel et en PC (avancées en Excel, PowerPoint, SAP / COGNOS, expérience BPC est un plus) - Excellentes compétences en gestion du temps et en priorisation avec la capacité de respecter des délais stricts - Commande forte de l'anglais (écrit et oral) - Compétences de communication prouvées pour interagir avec des personnes d'un contexte non financier - Compétences organisationnelles exceptionnelles et orientées vers les objectifs ## Ce que nous offrons - Une culture basée sur un feedback de soutien où le respect et l'intégrité nous guident dans ce que nous faisons - Un environnement international inclusif où les personnes de divers horizons, de styles de vie et de nationalités aiment travailler ensemble - Faire partie d'une marque de lifestyle iconique dans une organisation multi-marques et multi-pays - Salle de sport sur place offrant des initiatives de santé et de bien-être - Une carte de réduction avec 50% sur toutes les marques VF - Aires de repos offrant des boissons chaudes gratuites ## Contact R-20260323-0032

titles.it: Allocator Tirocinante - EMEA Programma di stage
titles.en: Allocator Intern - EMEA Internship Program
titles.fr: Allocator Stagiaire - EMEA Programme de stage

descriptions.it: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Allocator Intern for Vans. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! We are looking for a Allocator intern to join VANS within VF EMEA Internship Program. In this role, you will provide support to the Allocation Team: - By taking an active role in analysing performance and sales trend. - Monitoring deliveries, maintaining adequate stock levels. - Taking care of replenishment / initial allocation for O&O EMEA Stores. - Developing and maintaining reports and tools finding the best way to make them efficient and useful for the team. How you will make a difference You should be an analytical, resilient and curious team player, being: - Fluent in English with excellent verbal and written communication skills. - Passionate for numbers with strong analytical skills: accuracy and attention to details is a must. - Proficient in Microsoft Excel. Knowledge of any BI platform will be considered as a plus (eg: Power BI). - Eager to learn and face up new challenges. - Proactive in order to achieve yours and your team goals. - First experiences such as other internships, extracurricular activities, is considered as a plus What’s in it for you At the end of the Internship period, you can expect to have a clear understanding of the below: - Learn about Vans’ trends and main logics of Retail Merchandising. - Learn logics of inventory management, sales analysis, and allocation strategies. - Learn to work with a wide team of internal stakeholder. The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260205-0007

descriptions.it: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Retail Marketing Intern for Vans. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! This internship offers hands-on experiences at the intersection of marketing and retail, where you’ll help shape in-store activations while learning how brand strategy comes to life at the point of sale Support the planning and execution of retail marketing initiatives that enhance in-store visibility, customer engagement, and sales performance. Gain experience analyzing results, coordinating with cross-functional teams, and translating brand strategy into impactful retail activations. Get ready to make an impact! Here’s what you’ll be responsible for joining our team as Retail Marketing intern: - Support the planning and execution of retail marketing and in-store activations, helping bring Vans’ brand, culture, and stories to life in stores. - Coordinate with cross-functional teams (Retail, Creative, Visual Merchandising, and other Marketing functions) to gather all tactics needed to deliver engaging in-store events and consumer activations. - Assist with retail marketing operations across EMEA, supporting different store formats (Owned, Partner, Outlet). - Contribute to training and communication materials for store teams ahead of key activations or events. - Help execute retail campaigns and store activations, including in-store visuals, digital retail communications, and event-related materials. - Provide day-to-day support on cross-functional needs, such as copy coordination, translations, and event logistics. - Work closely with DTC (Direct To Consumer) Retail teams (district and store managers) to support smooth execution at store level. - Support the creation of briefs and post-activation recaps, capturing learnings and best practices for future in-store initiatives. - Support basic budget tracking and purchase order follow-up in coordination with the team. Skills that will make you successful You are a natural facilitator who helps ideas turn into real, on-the-ground experiences: - Project-minded and well-organized – You enjoy working in project mode, juggling multiple activations, and coordinating across Creative, Retail, Visual Merchandising, and Marketing teams. - Curious about retail marketing and in-store activations – You’re eager to understand how brand storytelling, consumer experience, and store execution come together in a physical retail environment. - Culturally connected – You have a strong eye for engaging content and a genuine affinity with action sports, street culture, and the Vans DNA (skate, music, art, and self-expression). - Detail-driven yet hands-on – You care about quality, follow through on execution, and take pride in getting the small details right for events and store activations. - Proactive and solution-oriented -You show initiative, adapt quickly, and keep things moving even when plans evolve or challenges arise. - Collaborative by nature – You thrive in team environments, share information openly, and contribute positively to collective success. - Comfortable working with data and tools – You enjoy using tools like Excel and PowerPoint to track projects, support reporting, and tell clear, visual stories. - A Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Marketing, Communication, Business, or a related field is nice to have, but we are most interested in your mindset, curiosity, and relevant experiences. What’s in it for you By joining the Vans Retail Marketing team, you’ll gain real, hands-on experience working on in-store activations and events for an iconic global action sports brand. During your internship, you will: - Work closely with international and cross-functional teams across Retail, Marketing, Creative, and Visual Merchandising. - Contribute to real retail activations and in-store events, from idea to execution. - Learn how brand strategy translates into physical retail experiences that engage consumers. - Receive exposure to retail marketing operations across EMEA, including different store formats. - Benefit from on-the-job learning, mentoring, and collaboration with experienced professionals in the industry. By the end of the internship, you can expect to have a clear understanding of: - How retail marketing and in-store activations are planned, executed, and measured. - How cross-functional teams collaborate to deliver impactful store experiences. - How Vans’ brand values and action-sports culture are expressed at retail level. - The operational side of retail marketing, including asset production, timelines, and budget basics. - What it takes to successfully deliver consumer-facing events in a fast-paced retail environment. The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260206-0013
