descriptions.it: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Digital Sales Intern for Smartwool & icebreaker. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! Ready to help shape how Smartwool & Icebreaker show up across Zalando, Amazon, and other digital platforms across EMEA? Join our Digital Platforms team and support two purpose-led, merino-obsessed outdoor brands in growing their presence with key digital partners. Contribute to the daily execution and long‑term evolution of our digital marketplace presence, helping us drive visibility, conversion, and brand excellence across key online partners. Support platform coordination, performance monitoring, and cross-functional collaboration to keep our digital ecosystem running smoothly. Get ready to make an impact! Here’s what you’ll be responsible for as a Digital Platforms Intern: - Coordinate daily activities across digital marketplaces and strategic accounts to keep launches, updates, and optimizations on track. - Support initiatives to drive conversion by ensuring products, content, and campaigns land effectively across platforms. - Develop and refine tools, trackers, and processes to help the team monitor performance and unlock new opportunities. - Contribute to relationship‑building with both internal and external partners, helping strengthen collaboration. - Bring fresh ideas to help expand Smartwool & Icebreaker’s presence across digital environments. - Assist with additional projects within the Digital Platforms team as needed. How you will make a difference Skills that will make you succeed: - You’re fluent in English and comfortable communicating clearly, with the ability to give context so others can easily follow your questions or updates. - You have a solid grasp of Excel fundamentals, including filters, VLOOKUP (or XLOOKUP), pivot tables, and working with large raw datasets. - You enjoy solving problems through data and aren’t afraid to dive into detailed spreadsheets or performance reports. - You bring curiosity, initiative, and the drive to learn quickly in a dynamic, cross‑functional environment. - Early experience through internships, projects, or extracurricular roles shows your ability to take ownership and follow through. A degree is great, but we care most about your mindset, curiosity, and ability to work with data and people in a fast‑moving environment. What’s in it for you In this internship, you’ll discover how two global outdoor merino brands can complement each other in serving different consumers across diverse digital channels - and you’ll be right at the heart of it. By the end of your internship, you can expect to have: - A solid understanding of different digital business models (priorities being Zalando and Amazon, but not only) and how brands win within them. - Experience reading and interpreting performance data to identify risks and opportunities. - Confidence supporting cross-functional teams and digital partners. - Hands-on insight into how we grow brand presence and conversion across multiple platforms. - A deeper appreciation for the world of merino wool—and the values behind Smartwool & Icebreaker. The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260204-0004

By the end of your internship, you can expect to have: - A solid understanding of different digital business models (priorities being Zalando and Amazon, but not only) and how brands win within them. - Experience reading and interpreting performance data to identify risks and opportunities. - Confidence supporting cross-functional teams and digital partners. - Hands-on insight into how we grow brand presence and conversion across multiple platforms. - A deeper appreciation for the world of merino wool—and the values behind Smartwool & Icebreaker. The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260204-0004

descriptions.it: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as AI & Digital Innovation Intern for the Digital Technology team. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! Bring your builder mindset to scale AI across iconic outdoor brands. We’re hiring an AI & Digital Innovation Intern to drive rapid experimentation with tools and workflows that improve digital experiences end - to - end. Drive rapid experimentation across ecommerce by evaluating and testing digital tools, platforms, and workflows that improve brand experiences and team productivity. Collaborate cross functionally with engineering, design, and marketing to pilot solutions, research emerging trends in AI/DXP, and present clear recommendations backed by lightweight experiments and metrics. Get ready to make an impact! Here’s what you’ll be responsible for joining our team as AI & Digital Innovation Intern : - Assist in evaluating and testing new digital tools, platforms, and workflows that improve brand experiences across e-commerce storefronts - Collaborate with engineering, design, and marketing teams to support project delivery and cross-functional communication - Research emerging trends in e-commerce, AI, and digital experience platforms and present findings to the team - Craft and refine prompts & guardrails for internal AI tools to support tasks like content ideation, QA, and consumer insights. - Frame problems into hypotheses and design lightweight experiments (pilots/AB tests, before after studies), define success metrics, and report outcomes with clear narratives. How you will make a difference You’ll make a difference by bringing a entrepreneur mindset—spotting opportunities, trying things quickly, and turning simple ideas into real, measurable improvements. Your curiosity for AI and talent for crafting smart prompts will help our teams experiment faster and unlock new ways of working. Skills that will make you succeed: - Problem framing & experimentation skills —ability to translate ambiguous needs into clear hypotheses, simple test designs, and meaningful, business relevant metrics. - E-commerce and DXP intuition —familiarity with storefront UX, content workflows, CMS/DXP concepts (nice to have, not mandatory). - Storytelling that drives decisions —turn complex tests into crisp narratives, demos, and recommendations for nontechnical stakeholders. - An engineering degree is nice to have, but not required —we care most about your curiosity, projects, and evidence of impact. What’s in it for you In the role of AI & Digital Innovation Intern, you will work side by side with engineering, design, and marketing; learn how decisions travel from strategy to storefront. Gain a front row seat to ecommerce, AI, and DXP trends in a multi - brand environment with global reach. We will support you with ad hoc trainings and networking opportunities across other functions and brands! At the end of the Internship period, you can expect to have a clear understanding of the below: - Handson AI in the real world: go from idea to pilot to measurable impact across multiple brands’ ecommerce experiences. - Mentorship & craft growth: guided learning in experimentation, prompt design, and AI product thinking; access to team playbooks and internal training. - Portfolio ready outcomes: ship case studies, prompt libraries, enablement assets, and experiment readouts you can proudly showcase. The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260213-0011

titles.it: Data Science Tirocinante - EMEA Programma di stage
titles.en: Data Science Intern - EMEA Internship Program
titles.fr: Data Science Stagiaire - EMEA Programme de stage

descriptions.it: Descrizione Sii un sognatore, fai la differenza! Unisciti al #VFInternshipProgram nella nostra sede centrale EMEA a Stabio, Svizzera, come Data Science Intern per il nostro team di Digital Technology. About VF VF sta ridefinendo cosa significa essere la migliore azienda di abbigliamento, calzature ed equipaggiamento al mondo, alimentando marche iconiche di lifestyle attivo come The North Face®, Vans® e Timberland®. Scopri di più su http://vfc.com . ## Informazioni chiave - Data di inizio: 1 giugno 2026 - Durata: 12 mesi, full-time - Stipendio mensile lordo: 1'850 CHF - Luogo: Sede centrale VF EMEA a Stabio, Svizzera - Processo di reclutamento snello: 3 colloqui (Recruiter, Responsabile delle Risorse Umane, potenziale Business Case) ## Requisiti di idoneità - Devi essere laureato dopo il 1 maggio 2026 OPPURE devi avere uno status di studente a partire da giugno 2026 - Devi essere cittadino dell'UE o dell'EEE (Area Economica Europea) ## Mansioni Cerchiamo un Data Science Intern per: - Supportare il ciclo di vita della gestione dei prodotti Data Science: Data Mining, Data Cleaning, Data Exploration, Feature engineering, Predictive modelling - Eseguire estrazioni di dati ad hoc e trasformazione di dati su diverse fonti di dati - Eseguire analisi esplorative preliminari per identificare tendenze, modelli e correlazioni - Lavorare in ambiente cloud con accesso alle ultime tecnologie AI e GenAI. ## Cosa offriamo - Esposizione estensiva a diverse tecnologie di elaborazione dei dati e Data Science come: Python, SQL - Esposizione a progetti complessi end-to-end, con molte opportunità per vedere come relazionarsi con gli stakeholder tecnici e aziendali in processi trasformativi all'interno di una grande azienda - Esposizione a strumenti di visualizzazione dei dati e business intelligence e creazione di report su diversi domini e grandi set di dati ## Skills richiesti Abilità che ti faranno riuscire: - Sei fluente in inglese con eccellenti abilità di comunicazione verbale e scritta - Hai una mentalità curiosa con passione per lavorare con le persone - Sei ansioso di imparare e affrontare nuove sfide - Mostri iniziativa e forte drive per raggiungere i tuoi obiettivi e quelli del team - La prima esperienza come altri tirocini, attività extracurriculari, è considerata un vantaggio ## Programma di internship Il Programma di Internship VF EMEA è un percorso di 12 mesi progettato per sviluppare e potenziare i talenti emergenti all'inizio della loro carriera. Siamo impegnati a liberare il tuo potenziale, quindi puoi aspettarti un percorso di apprendimento strutturato e una ricca esperienza pratica, tra cui: - Workshop di costruzione delle abilità dedicate e progetto di gruppo di consulenza interna - Un giorno di lavoro in negozio per ottenere informazioni reali sulle nostre marche - Opportunità di networking con colleghi e leadership senior ## Benefici Poiché vogliamo che tu ti concentri su ciò che conta, offriamo benefici completi che incoraggiano il benessere mentale, fisico e finanziario. Godrai di: - Politica di lavoro ibrida - Sconto del 50% sui marchi VF - Palestra in loco, che offre iniziative di salute e benessere - Mensa sovvenzionata, nonché aree di pausa che offrono bevande gratuite - Autobus navetta per l'ufficio o sconto sui trasporti pubblici, a seconda della tua posizione - Una comunità di stagisti in forte crescita, con persone di diversi background, stili di vita e nazionalità che amano lavorare insieme. ## Contatto Sei pronto?
descriptions.en: Descrizione Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Data Science Intern for our Digital Technology team. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . ## Informazioni chiave - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) ## Requisiti di idoneità - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship ## Mansioni We are looking for a Data Science Intern for: - Supporting the Data Science product lifecycle management: Data Mining, Data Cleaning, Data Exploration, Feature engineering, Predictive modelling - Run ad hoc data extract and data transformation across different data source - Run preliminary explorative analysis to identify trends, patterns and correlations - Work in cloud environment accessing to the latest AI and GenAI technologies. ## Cosa offriamo - Extensive exposure to different Data processing and Data Science technologies such as: Python, SQL - Exposure to end-to-end complex projects, with many chances to see how to relate with technical and business stakeholders in transformative processes inside a large Company - Exposure to Data Visualization and Business intelligence tools and creation of reporting across different domain and big data set ## Skills richiesti Skills that will make you succeed: - You are fluent in English with excellent verbal and written communication skills - You have curious mindset with passion for working with people - You are eager to learn and face up new challenges - You show initiative and strong drive to achieve yours and your team goals - First experience such as other internships, extracurricular activities, is considered as a plus ## Programma di internship The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership ## Benefici Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. ## Contatto Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260211-0015
descriptions.de: Beschreibung Sei ein Träumer, mach einen Unterschied! Schließe dich dem #VFInternshipProgram in unserem EMEA-Hauptquartier in Stabio, Schweiz, als Data Science Intern für unser Digital Technology-Team an. Über VF VF definiert neu, was es bedeutet, das weltweit beste Bekleidungs-, Schuh- und Ausrüstungsunternehmen zu sein, und befeuert ikonische Active-Lifestyle-Marken wie The North Face®, Vans® und Timberland®. Erfahre mehr unter http://vfc.com . ## Schlüsselinformationen - Startdatum: 1. Juni 2026 - Dauer: 12 Monate, Vollzeit - Bruttomonatsgehalt: 1'850 CHF - Standort: VF EMEA-Hauptquartier in Stabio, Schweiz - Straffes Rekrutierungsverfahren: 3 Interviews (Recruiter, Einstellungsmanager, potenzieller Business Case) ## Eignungsvoraussetzungen - Sie müssen nach dem 1. Mai 2026 graduieren ODER Sie müssen ab Juni 2026 Student sein - Sie müssen die Staatsbürgerschaft der EU oder des EWR (Europäischer Wirtschaftsraum) besitzen ## Aufgaben Wir suchen einen Data Science Intern für: - Unterstützung des Produktlebenszyklus-Managements für Data Science: Data Mining, Data Cleaning, Data Exploration, Feature-Engineering, Predictive Modelling - Durchführung von Ad-hoc-Datenextraktionen und Daten transformationen über verschiedene Datenquellen - Durchführung von vorläufigen explorativen Analysen zur Identifizierung von Trends, Mustern und Korrelationen - Arbeit in einer Cloud-Umgebung mit Zugang zu den neuesten KI- und GenAI-Technologien ## Was wir bieten - Umfangreiche Exposition gegenüber verschiedenen Datenverarbeitungs- und Data-Science-Technologien wie: Python, SQL - Exposition gegenüber komplexen End-to-End-Projekten, mit vielen Chancen, zu sehen, wie man sich mit technischen und geschäftlichen Stakeholdern in transformativen Prozessen innerhalb eines großen Unternehmens in Beziehung setzt - Exposition gegenüber Data-Visualisierungs- und Business-Intelligence-Tools und Erstellung von Berichten über verschiedene Domänen und große Datenmengen ## Erforderliche Fähigkeiten Fähigkeiten, die Sie erfolgreich machen: - Sie sind fließend in Englisch mit exzellenten verbalen und schriftlichen Kommunikationsfähigkeiten - Sie haben eine neugierige Einstellung mit Leidenschaft für die Arbeit mit Menschen - Sie sind begierig, zu lernen und neue Herausforderungen anzunehmen - Sie zeigen Initiative und starken Antrieb, Ihre und die Ziele Ihres Teams zu erreichen - Erste Erfahrungen wie andere Praktika, außer-curriculäre Aktivitäten, werden als Pluspunkt betrachtet ## Praktikumsprogramm Das VF EMEA-Praktikumsprogramm ist ein 12-monatiges Programm, das darauf abzielt, aufstrebende Talente zu Beginn ihrer Karriere zu entwickeln und zu stärken. Wir sind bestrebt, Ihr Potenzial freizusetzen, sodass Sie einen strukturierten Lernpfad und eine reiche praktische Erfahrung erwarten können, einschließlich: - Dedizierte Workshops zur Fähigkeitsbildung und internes Beratungsgruppenprojekt - Ein Tag Arbeit im Laden, um echte Einblicke in unsere Marken zu gewinnen - Networking-Möglichkeiten mit Kollegen und Senior-Führungskräften ## Vorteile Da wir möchten, dass Sie sich auf das konzentrieren, was zählt, bieten wir umfassende Vorteile, die das geistige, körperliche und finanzielle Wohlbefinden fördern. Sie werden genießen: - Hybride Arbeitsrichtlinie - 50% Rabatt auf VF-Marken - Fitnessstudio vor Ort, das Gesundheits- und Wellnessinitiativen anbietet - Bezuschusste Kantine sowie Pausenbereiche, die kostenlose Getränke anbieten - Shuttlebus zum Büro oder Rabatt auf öffentliche Verkehrsmittel, je nach Standort - Eine florierende Praktikantengemeinschaft mit Menschen aus verschiedenen Hintergründen, Lebensstilen und Nationalitäten, die gerne zusammenarbeiten. ## Kontakt Bist du bereit? Bewirb dich jetzt - eine frühzeitige Bewerbung erhöht deine Chancen! #readytoapply R-20260211-0015
descriptions.fr: Description Soyez un rêveur, faites une différence ! Rejoignez le #VFInternshipProgram dans notre siège social EMEA à Stabio, Suisse, en tant que stagiaire en Data Science pour notre équipe de technologie numérique. À propos de VF VF redéfinit ce que signifie être la meilleure entreprise de vêtements, de chaussures et d'équipement au monde, en alimentant des marques de style de vie actif emblématiques telles que The North Face®, Vans® et Timberland®. En savoir plus sur http://vfc.com . ## Informations clés - Date de début : 1er juin 2026 - Durée : 12 mois, temps plein - Salaire mensuel brut : 1'850 CHF - Lieu : Siège social VF EMEA à Stabio, Suisse - Processus de recrutement simplifié : 3 entretiens (Recruteur, Responsable du recrutement, cas commercial potentiel) ## Exigences d'éligibilité - Vous devez être diplômé après le 1er mai 2026 OU vous devez avoir un statut d'étudiant à partir de juin 2026 - Vous devez détenir la citoyenneté de l'UE ou de l'EEE (Espace économique européen) ## Missions Nous recherchons un stagiaire en Data Science pour : - Soutenir le cycle de vie de la gestion des produits de Data Science : Data Mining, Data Cleaning, Data Exploration, Feature engineering, Predictive modelling - Exécuter des extractions de données ad hoc et des transformations de données sur différentes sources de données - Effectuer des analyses exploratoires préliminaires pour identifier les tendances, les modèles et les corrélations - Travailler dans un environnement cloud avec accès aux dernières technologies AI et GenAI. ## Ce que nous offrons - Exposition extensive à différentes technologies de traitement de données et de Data Science telles que : Python, SQL - Exposition à des projets complexes de bout en bout, avec de nombreuses occasions de voir comment interagir avec les parties prenantes techniques et commerciales dans des processus transformateurs au sein d'une grande entreprise - Exposition à des outils de visualisation de données et de business intelligence et création de rapports sur différents domaines et grands ensembles de données ## Compétences requises Compétences qui vous feront réussir : - Vous êtes fluent en anglais avec d'excellentes compétences de communication verbale et écrite - Vous avez une mentalité curieuse avec une passion pour travailler avec les gens - Vous êtes impatient d'apprendre et de relever de nouveaux défis - Vous montrez de l'initiative et une forte motivation pour atteindre vos objectifs et ceux de votre équipe - Une première expérience telle que d'autres stages, des activités parascolaires, est considérée comme un plus ## Programme de stage Le programme de stage VF EMEA est un parcours de 12 mois conçu pour développer et renforcer les talents émergents au début de leur carrière. Nous sommes déterminés à libérer votre potentiel, vous pouvez donc vous attendre à un chemin d'apprentissage structuré et à une riche expérience pratique, comprenant : - Ateliers de construction de compétences dédiés et projet de groupe de conseil interne - Une journée de travail en magasin pour obtenir des informations réelles sur nos marques - Opportunités de réseautage avec des collègues et des dirigeants seniors ## Avantages Puisque nous voulons que vous vous concentriez sur ce qui compte, nous offrons des avantages complets qui encouragent le bien-être mental, physique et financier. Vous apprécierez : - Politique de travail hybride - 50% de réduction sur les marques VF - Salle de sport sur place offrant des initiatives de santé et de bien-être - Cantine subventionnée, ainsi que des zones de pause offrant des boissons gratuites - Bus de navette pour le bureau ou réduction sur les transports en commun, selon votre localisation - Une communauté de stagiaires florissante, avec des personnes de divers horizons, styles de vie et nationalités qui aiment travailler ensemble. ## Contact Êtes-vous prêt ? Postulez maintenant - une candidature anticipée augmente vos chances ! #readytoapply R-20260211-0015

descriptions.it: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Digital Retail Technology & Gen AI Intern for our Digital Technology team. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! Are you passionate about Retail Technology and eager to explore how GenAI is transforming the consumer and store experience? As a Digital Retail Technology & Gen AI Intern, you will support the design, analysis and evolution of digital retail solutions across stores and omnichannel platforms, with a focus also on GenAI use cases, data‑driven decision making, and retail technology innovation. You will collaborate with cross‑functional teams to translate business needs into scalable, technology‑enabled solutions that enhance efficiency and customer experience. Here’s what you’ll be responsible for: - Support the analysis and documentation of retail technology processes (e.g. store systems, Order Management Systems, clienteling, order fulfilment, and omnichannel flows) - Contribute to GenAI initiatives, including use‑case discovery, functional analysis, prompt experimentation, and performance evaluation - Assist in translating business and user needs into functional requirements and solution concepts - Collaborate with product owners, engineers, data teams, and business stakeholders across EMEA - Contribute to data analysis, dashboards, or insight generation to support informed decision‑making - Support pilot initiatives, proof‑of‑concepts, and continuous improvement activities related to digital retail platforms How you will make a difference Skills that will make you succeed: - Strong interest in Retail Technology, Digital Commerce, and Store Technologies - Solid understanding of Generative AI concepts (e.g. LLMs, prompt engineering, AI‑assisted analytics) and curiosity to apply them in a business context - Analytical mindset with the ability to structure problems and interpret data - Familiarity with digital platforms, data flows, APIs, or cloud‑based systems is a plus - Ability to collaborate effectively in cross‑functional and international teams - Proactive attitude, learning mindset, and willingness to experiment and iterate - Fluency in English (written and spoken); knowledge of additional languages is a plus - A degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Systems, Data Science, Business Technology, or similar is nice to have, but we are most interested in your curiosity, problem‑solving skills, and passion for retail innovation. What’s in it for you In this role, you will: - Gain hands‑on exposure to enterprise retail technology platforms used by global brands - Learn how GenAI is applied in real business scenarios, from process optimization to decision support - Work within an Agile, product‑driven environment, learning modern digital delivery practices - Collaborate with experienced product, technology, and business professionals across EMEA - Build a strong foundation for a career in Digital Retail, Product Management, or AI‑enabled Transformation By the end of the internship, you will have: - A practical understanding of retail digital ecosystems - Experience contributing to GenAI‑enabled initiatives - Increased confidence working with stakeholders, data, and technology solutions in a global organization The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Participate in dedicated skill-building workshops - Collaborate on an internal consulting group project - Gain real insights about our brands by spending one day of work in-store - Connect through networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260209-0007
